title: Seeking any cleaning contracts between BJC Health (and affiliates) with DOC

communications.subject: The Missouri Sunshine Law Request: Seeking any cleaning contracts between BJC Health (and affiliates) with DOC
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the The Missouri Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Hello,

I am reaching out to find out if the MO Department of Corrections and/or its facilities have any contracts with BJC Health and/or its affiliates that would relate to the cleaning of hospital linens or other laundry services. While these contracts could be with BJC Health, it is also possible that they would have been signed with one or more subsidiaries, such as the various regional hospitals that BJC Health operates throughout the state.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 3 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Glenn Burleigh
